title: At the Hotel
description: Check in, ask about your room, and handle requests at a Japanese hotel or ryokan.
situation: Accommodation: reservations, check-in and check-out, room questions, wifi, and getting help from the front desk.

phrases.native: チェックインをお願いします
チェックアウトは何時ですか
phrases.transliteration: chekku auto wa nanji desu ka
phrases.pronunciation: chek-koo ow-toh wah nan-jee dess kah

phrases.native: wifiのパスワードは何ですか
phrases.transliteration: waifai no pasuwaado wa nan desu ka
phrases.pronunciation: wai-fai noh pahs-wah-doh wah nan dess kah

phrases.native: 朝食は付いていますか
部屋を変えてもらえますか
タオルをもう一枚ください
phrases.tip: 一枚 (ichimai) is the counter for flat things like towels and paper.

phrases.native: 荷物を預けられますか
phrases.tip: Useful before check-in or after check-out on travel days.

phrases.native: 近くにおすすめの場所はありますか
phrases.transliteration: chikaku ni osusume no basho wa arimasu ka
phrases.pronunciation: chee-kah-koo nee oh-soo-soo-meh noh bah-shoh wah ah-ree-mahs kah

phrases.native: タクシーを呼んでもらえますか
phrases.english: Could you call a taxi for me?

phrases.tip: A warm set phrase to thank staff for looking after you during your stay.
